text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 91 

GAP_INNPP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Gap In-Network Non-Preferred Pharmacy Coinsurance for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than 1- or 3-months) on this tier, using an in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNPP) during the 
coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: —
